raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/year> I placed an order of {$100.00} for a pair of XXXX sneakers. The sneakers were delivered to the wrong address and I was never able to retrieve them. I contacted XXXX, who told me that they issued {$100.00} credit on XX/XX/year>. ( I can provide this email to you. ) I never received a credit on my Citibank account and they asked me to provide proof of what XXXX said. I did this. After much back & forth and them crediting and recharging the {$100.00} several times, they never resolved the issue. It has been over XXXX months and I recently sent them XXXX emails requesting the status. They have ignored both emails. They did not respond directly to my first email but did send a letter in my Citibank portal claiming the dispute was resolved and that I received the {$100.00} credit. I emailed them again because according to my own records I DID NOT receive the credit. I sifted through many of my statements and have no record of the refund. I told them this via email and asked that they inform me exactly of when the refund was issued but they refuse to respond.
